word: H4535 - מַסָּח - maççâch - mas-sawkh' - Broken down

sections.paragraph:
Original: מסּח

Transliteration: massâch

Phonetic: mas-sawkh'

BDB Definition:

  1. meaning uncertain - perhaps
    1. guard (noun)
    2. alternately, by turns (adverb)

Origin: from H5255 in the sense of staving off

TWOT entry: 1374a

Part(s) of speech:
